zh.lifeSummary: 當Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II於1107年5月18日出生在法國崔英德-吉洛易安波時，他的父親Hugues I d'AMBOISE53歲，母親Elisabeth de JALIGNY23歲。他於1129年與Agnès de DONZY結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1153年9月14日在法國崔艾-吉洛易a奧度享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II于1107年5月18日出生在法国崔英德-吉洛易安波时，他的父亲Hugues I d'AMBOISE53岁，母亲Elisabeth de JALIGNY23岁。他于1129年与Agnès de DONZY结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1153年9月14日在法国崔艾-吉洛易a奧度享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: D'amboise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Jeannot, Laurent, Marcel, Michel, Pascal.
French (also D'Amboise): habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Amboise in Indre-et-Loire.

nameMeanings.name: Dauphin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Armand, Emile, Antoine, Benoit, Carmelle, Fernand, Georges, Jean Claude, Laure, Luckner, Maryse.

French and Haitian: from the French personal name Dauphin, from Latin Delphinus, derived from Greek delphis ‘dolphin’. This name was borne by a 4th-century Christian saint who was bishop of Bordeaux, and from the early 12th century it was in use as a hereditary personal name in the family of the counts of Albon, so that it soon came to be used as a title and led to their territory (capital Grenoble) being known as the Dauphiné. When it became part of the Kingdom of France in 1349, the title of dauphin thereafter denoted the heir-apparent to the throne, and it is possible that in some cases this is the origin of the surname, either denoting a member of the Dauphin's household or applied as a nickname in the sense of ‘prince’.

variants.name: Dauphine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Aurelien.
French (Dauphiné): habitational name from the Dauphiné region of southeastern France (see Dauphin ).

nameMeanings.name: Du
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ‘Jade’. Jade is a symbol of purity, longevity, or immortality, also of feminine beauty.

nameMeanings.name: Vienne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name of the capital of Austria (so called from the river on which it stands, thought to have derived its name from the Celtic element vindo ‘white’). Modern adoption as a female first name follows the pattern of other female-sounding city names such as Verona , Siena , Ravenna , and Paris .

en.lifeSummary: When Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II was born on 18 May 1107, in Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, his father, Hugues I d'AMBOISE, was 53 and his mother, Elisabeth de JALIGNY, was 23. He married Agnès de DONZY in 1129. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 14 September 1153, in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II est né le 18 mai 1107, à Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, son père, Hugues I d'AMBOISE, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de JALIGNY, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de DONZY en 1129. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1153, à Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II am 18. Mai 1107 in Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues I d'AMBOISE 53 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de JALIGNY 23. Er hat 1129 Agnès de DONZY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 14. September 1153 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II è nato il il 18 maggio 1107 nel Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues I d'AMBOISE, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de JALIGNY, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de DONZY nel 1129. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 14 settembre 1153, nel Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise IIが1107年5月18日にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアーアンボイゼで生まれた時，父Hugues I d'AMBOISEは53歳，母Elisabeth de JALIGNYは23歳であった。1129年にAgnès de DONZYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1153年9月14日にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルチaテアウダンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II(이)가 1107년 5월 18일 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 아보이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues I d'AMBOISE(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de JALIGNY(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1129년 Agnès de DONZY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1153년 9월 14일 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 cha테오던에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.18 MAY 1107–14 SEP 1153: 18 de maio de 1107–14 de setembro de 1153
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II nasceu em 18 de maio de 1107, em Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, seu pai, Hugues I d'AMBOISE, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de JALIGNY, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de DONZY em 1129. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1153, em Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II родился 18 мая 1107 г. в местности эмбоис, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues I d'AMBOISE было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de JALIGNY, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de DONZY в 1129 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 14 сентября 1153 г. в местности чaтодун, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 46 лет.

es.18 MAY 1107–14 SEP 1153: 18 de mayo de 1107–14 de septiembre de 1153
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sulpice Dauphin Du Vienne D'amboise II nació el 18 de mayo de 1107, en Amboise, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, su papá, Hugues I d'AMBOISE, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de JALIGNY, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Agnès de DONZY en 1129. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1153, en Châteaudun, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 46 años.
